use_cases.target_stack: OpenClaw reasoning layer + n8n approval workflow
use_cases.evidence: High document volume, manual classification and visible approval bottlenecks.

use_cases.target_stack: OpenClaw analyst agent + SQL review workflow
use_cases.evidence: Recurring portfolio reviews need faster query-to-memo cycles.
Knowledge is scattered across procedures, FAQs and support notes.

use_cases.target_stack: OpenClaw agent with strict n8n human approval gate
use_cases.evidence: Revenue upside exists, but approval, brand and CRM controls are not mature.

use_cases.target_stack: n8n scheduled reporting + LLM narrative review
use_cases.evidence: Weekly reporting cycle is repetitive and already has trusted source tables.

use_cases.target_stack: OpenClaw guided copilot + n8n compliance gate
use_cases.evidence: Strong operational pain, but controls and validation gates must be designed first.
